summary: Iteration 106 - Pipeline Hardening & Observability validation complete. All 53 pytest tests passed (31 pipeline hardening + 22 refactor regression). All new GET /api/document-intelligence/pipeline/runs/{doc_id} endpoint features verified. All 9 regression endpoints confirmed working.
passed_tests: GET /api/document-intelligence/pipeline/stages returns 9 stages in correct order
POST /api/document-intelligence/pipeline/{doc_id} returns run_id, pipeline_version, started_at, finished_at, total_duration_ms

output_safety._sanitize_output: caps keys at 25, strings at 500 chars, lists at 25 items
output_safety.PipelineResult.to_dict: serializes all stages with sanitized output

status_semantics.ok: stage executed successfully and produced output
status_semantics.skipped: stage did not execute (explicit or dependency-based)

regression_verified.post_pipeline_endpoint: POST /api/document-intelligence/pipeline/{doc_id} returns run_id, pipeline_version, timing fields

critical_code_review_comments: StageResult and PipelineResult dataclasses correctly implement to_dict() with sanitization
_sanitize_output properly caps keys, strings, and lists to prevent oversized trace payloads
Status semantics (ok/skipped/error) are well-documented and correctly applied
GET /api/document-intelligence/pipeline/runs/{doc_id} endpoint correctly validates limit param (ge=1, le=100)
Pipeline version v2 with 9 stages is correctly implemented with backward compatibility for v1 (7 stages)

success_rate.backend: 100% (53/53 pytest tests + 11/11 API curl tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 106 - Pipeline Hardening & Observability validation complete. All new GET /api/document-intelligence/pipeline/runs/{doc_id} endpoint features verified including limit param validation (1-100), response shape {document_id, runs, count}, and 422 errors for invalid limits. All 9 pipeline stages confirmed in correct order. POST /api/document-intelligence/pipeline/{doc_id} continues to work and returns run_id, pipeline_version, timing fields. All regression tests pass (health, auth, documents). BC/Graph/SharePoint APIs remain mocked in demo mode.
mocked_apis_note: BC/Graph/SharePoint APIs are mocked in demo mode. No new mocks added.
